source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter Variable for compact English product UI, Noto Sans JP for Japanese navigation, forms, labels, and status text, plus Geist Mono-style numeric rhythm for dashboard data and tabular telemetry.
layout: Crisp shell-panel surfaces, compact operational dashboards, precise navigation, dense but readable forms and tables, command search, 8px maximum radii, amber focus rings, olive dividers, metallic emerald actions, and subtle ridged carapace texture.

prompts.label: Transparent emerald cockroach motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Emerald Cockroach transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated emerald cockroach motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single emerald cockroach with accurate cockroach anatomy, glossy metallic emerald green wing covers and pronotum, subtle blue-green iridescence, amber translucent leg joints and antennae, dark olive leg shadows, fine segmented legs, crisp antennae, and a resilient tropical-leaf presence without any leaf in the scene. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full insect from a slightly elevated three-quarter top view, including head shield, thorax, wing covers, abdomen edge, antennae, and all legs without cropping. Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves metallic green shell detail and amber leg translucency, crisp silhouette edges. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no leaf, no branch, no soil, no tropical background, no second insect, no cartoon, no jewelry, no toy, no logo, no readable text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation from the emerald cockroach motif, then resampled to a 3840 x 2160 PNG source board.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Emerald Cockroach light-mode design-system board, high-resolution source. Input image role: The visible transparent emerald cockroach motif is the sole source reference for palette, texture, contrast, surface language, and resilient system mood. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Emerald Cockroach", derived from the visible transparent emerald cockroach cutout. Canvas: strict 16:9 wide landscape design board intended for a 3840 x 2160 PNG source. Compose for true 4K readability with very large labels, generous gutters, and no tiny token table text. Required visible sections: Morphous Emerald Cockroach, Emerald Cockroach, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Layout direction: use a precise editorial product-system grid with 5 large bands, each section readable at gallery preview size. Keep fewer but bigger rows and controls instead of many tiny elements. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from metallic emerald wing covers, blue-green iridescent highlights, amber translucent legs and antennae, dark olive leg shadows, tropical leaf shadow, polished shell ridges, and resilient insect armor. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, token swatches, and simple product icons. Typography: include readable English type guidance and Japanese typography guidance using short Japanese samples: 日本語 UI, 検索, 状態, 保存, 設定. Labels must be large, crisp, and sparse. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style resilient system, exacting operational UI, no radius above 8px, crisp shell-panel surfaces, metallic green primary actions, amber focus and warning accents, dark olive divider shadows, tropical leaf near-neutrals, fine ridged texture, compact dashboard density. Color palette: motif-derived colors only plus near-neutrals: shell ivory background, pale leaf surface, metallic emerald, deep emerald, blue-green glint, amber leg, warm resin, olive shadow, graphite ink, tropical night. Text constraints: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Emerald Cockroach" or "Emerald Cockroach", no tiny unreadable labels. Avoid: unrelated bright colors, generic purple or blue gradients, rounded pills above 8px radius, marketing hero layout, stock UI kit styling, logo clutter, fake browser chrome dominating the board.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation from the emerald cockroach motif and light board, then resampled to a 3840 x 2160 PNG source board.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Emerald Cockroach dark-mode design-system board, high-resolution source. Input image roles: The visible transparent emerald cockroach motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Emerald Cockroach". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible emerald cockroach cutout. Canvas: strict 16:9 wide landscape design board intended for a 3840 x 2160 PNG source. Compose for true 4K readability with very large labels, generous gutters, and no tiny token table text. Required visible sections: Morphous Emerald Cockroach, Emerald Cockroach, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Layout direction: preserve the light board's comprehensive grid logic with large readable modules. Keep fewer but bigger rows and controls instead of many tiny elements. Visual details: dark background derived from tropical night, deep emerald, and olive leg shadow; foreground from shell ivory and pale leaf; primary actions from metallic emerald; secondary states from blue-green glint; focus and warning from amber leg and warm resin; borders from deep olive shell ridges; subtle polished carapace texture overlays and restrained iridescent glints. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, radius, spacing, shadows, and semantic token swatches. Typography: include readable English type guidance and Japanese typography guidance using short Japanese samples: 日本語 UI, 検索, 状態, 保存, 設定. Labels must be large, crisp, and sparse. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style resilient system, exacting operational UI, no radius above 8px, dark shell-panel surfaces, crisp emerald actions, amber focus rings, dark olive dividers, tactile ridged carapace texture, compact dashboard density. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Emerald Cockroach" or "Emerald Cockroach", no tiny unreadable labels.
